sentence: 她从小爱读书，长大后成了出名的才女。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo ài dú shū, zhǎng dà hòu chéng le chū míng de cái nǚ.
english: She loved reading from a young age and grew up to become a well-known talented woman.

sentence: 她周末经常参加公益活动帮助社区。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò jīngcháng cānjiā gōngyì huódòng bāngzhù shèqū.
english: She often takes part in public welfare activities to help the community on weekends.

meaning: 1. hot spot; 2. point of special interest
sentence: 这个话题是最近的网络热点。
pinyin: Zhège huàtí shì zuìjìn de wǎngluò rèdiǎn.
english: This topic is the latest online hot spot.

sentence: 情人节那天餐厅里全是情侣。
pinyin: Qíngrénjié nà tiān cāntīng lǐ quán shì qínglǚ.
english: On Valentine's Day the restaurant was full of couples.

sentence: 气象站每天监测当地的天气变化。
pinyin: Qìxiàngzhàn měitiān jiāncè dāngdì de tiānqì biànhuà.
english: The weather station monitors local weather changes every day.

sentence: 装修时把地台抬高了一点，看起来更宽敞。
pinyin: Zhuāng xiū shí bǎ dì tái tái gāo le yī diǎn, kàn qǐ lái gèng kuān chǎng.
english: During renovation they raised the floor platform a bit, making the space feel more open.

sentence: 台湾海峡的风浪很大。
pinyin: Táiwān Hǎixiá de fēnglàng hěn dà.
english: The waves in the Taiwan Strait are very rough.

sentence: 每天早上学校都会升国旗。
pinyin: Měitiān zǎoshang xuéxiào dōu huì shēng guóqí.
english: The school raises the national flag every morning.

sentence: 出发前请对照清单检查行李。
pinyin: Chūfā qián qǐng duìzhào qīngdān jiǎnchá xíngli.
english: Please check your luggage against the list before you leave.

sentence: 健全的法制是社会稳定的基础。
pinyin: Jiàn quán de fǎ zhì shì shè huì wěn dìng de jī chǔ.
english: A sound legal system is the foundation of social stability.

sentence: 不同地域的饮食习惯差别很大。
pinyin: Bù tóng dì yù de yǐn shí xí guàn chā bié hěn dà.
english: Eating habits vary a lot across different regions.

sentence: 学校派了一支代表团去参加比赛。
pinyin: Xuéxiào pài le yì zhī dài biǎo tuán qù cānjiā bǐsài.
english: The school sent a delegation to take part in the competition.

sentence: 今天股市涨得很厉害。
pinyin: Jīn tiān gǔ shì zhǎng de hěn lì hai.
english: The stock market rose sharply today.

sentence: 这家小店开业第一年就开始盈利了。
pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎodiàn kāiyè dì yī nián jiù kāishǐ yínglì le.
english: This little shop started turning a profit in its very first year of business.

sentence: 这台电视的影音效果非常好。
pinyin: Zhè tái diàn shì de yǐng yīn xiào guǒ fēi cháng hǎo.
english: The audiovisual quality of this TV is excellent.

sentence: 新年快乐，万事如意！
pinyin: Xīnnián kuàilè, wànshì rúyì!
english: Happy New Year, may everything go your way!

sentence: 这本书是由一家知名出版社出版的。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì yóu yī jiā zhīmíng chūbǎnshè chūbǎn de.
english: This book was published by a well-known publishing house.

sentence: 他坐在吧台边点了一杯咖啡。
pinyin: Tā zuò zài bātái biān diǎn le yī bēi kāfēi.
english: He sat at the bar counter and ordered a cup of coffee.

sentence: 历史上许多无道的统治者最终都被推翻。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng xǔduō wúdào de tǒngzhìzhě zuìzhōng dōu bèi tuīfān.
english: Many tyrannical rulers throughout history were ultimately overthrown.

sentence: 这个网站在各地都有分站，方便用户访问。
pinyin: Zhè gè wǎng zhàn zài gè dì dōu yǒu fēn zhàn, fāng biàn yòng hù fǎng wèn.
english: This website has substations in various locations, making it convenient for users to access.

meaning: 1. to perplex; 2. to disturb; 3. to cause complications
sentence: 失眠的问题已经困扰了他好几个月。
pinyin: Shīmián de wèntí yǐjīng kùnrǎole tā hǎo jǐ gè yuè.
english: The problem of insomnia has been troubling him for several months.

sentence: 两国正在深化经济合作。
pinyin: Liǎng guó zhèngzài shēnhuà jīngjì hézuò.
english: The two countries are deepening their economic cooperation.

sentence: 他周末做兼职来赚点外快。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò zuò jiānzhí lái zuàn diǎn wàikuài.
english: He does part-time work on weekends to earn some extra income.

sentence: 这套公寓有水有电，可以马上入住。
pinyin: Zhè tào gōng yù yǒu shuǐ yǒu diàn, kě yǐ mǎ shàng rù zhù.
english: This apartment has water and electricity and is ready to move into right away.

sentence: 这种饮料的糖分含量太高，少喝为好。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yǐnliào de tángfèn hánliàng tài gāo, shǎo hē wéi hǎo.
english: This drink has too high a sugar content — it's better to drink less of it.

meaning: 1. association; 2. society; 3. group; 4. union; 5. club; 6. organizati
sentence: 她大学时参加了舞蹈社团。
pinyin: Tā dàxué shí cānjiāle wǔdǎo shètuán.
english: She joined a dance club when she was in university.

sentence: 夏季天热，她每天都喝冰水。
pinyin: Xià jì tiān rè, tā měi tiān dōu hē bīng shuǐ.
english: In summer the weather is hot, so she drinks ice water every day.

meaning: 1. to wash; 2. to clean; 3. to purge
sentence: 用清水清洗蔬菜再下锅。
pinyin: Yòng qīngshuǐ qīngxǐ shūcài zài xià guō.
english: Rinse the vegetables with clean water before cooking.

meaning: that's fine; may as well; (reduplicated) regardless of whether ... or
sentence: 去也好，不去也好，随你。
pinyin: Qù yě hǎo, bù qù yě hǎo, suí nǐ.
english: Whether you go or not is fine, it's up to you.

meaning: 1. to retail; 2. to sell individually or in small quantities
sentence: 这家店既批发也零售商品。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn jì pīfā yě língshòu shāngpǐn.
english: This store sells goods both wholesale and retail.

meaning: (computing) (text file) line number; (data table or spreadsheet) row n
sentence: 代码报错了，看一下是哪个行号出问题。
pinyin: Dài mǎ bào cuò le, kàn yī xià shì nǎ gè háng háo chū wèn tí.
english: The code threw an error — check which line number has the problem.

sentence: 他花了几百块注册了一个好记的域名。
pinyin: Tā huā le jǐ bǎi kuài zhù cè le yī gè hǎo jì de yù míng.
english: He spent a few hundred yuan registering an easy-to-remember domain name.

sentence: 妈妈很担忧我的健康。
pinyin: Māma hěn dānyōu wǒ de jiànkāng.
english: Mom is very worried about my health.

meaning: Never (not in the future, present, or past; habitually)
sentence: 他从来不迟到上班。
pinyin: Tā cónglái bù chídào shàngbān.
english: He never arrives late to work.

sentence: 上课时记笔记有助于加深理解。
pinyin: Shàngkè shí jì bǐjì yǒuzhù yú jiāshēn lǐjiě.
english: Taking notes in class helps deepen understanding.

sentence: 会议室里某人忘了带钥匙。
pinyin: Huìyìshì lǐ mǒurén wàng le dài yàoshi.
english: Someone in the meeting room forgot to bring their key.

meaning: 1. census; 2. general survey; 3. general investigation; 4. reconnaissa
sentence: 政府每十年进行一次人口普查。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ měi shí nián jìnxíng yī cì rénkǒu pǔchá.
english: The government conducts a population census every ten years.

sentence: 这位候选人被认为属于左派。
pinyin: Zhè wèi hòuxuǎnrén bèi rènwéi shǔyú zuǒpài.
english: This candidate is considered to belong to the left wing.

sentence: 这个国家实行共和制度已有百年。
pinyin: Zhège guójiā shíxíng gònghé zhìdù yǐ yǒu bǎi nián.
english: This country has practiced a republican system for a hundred years.

meaning: 1. chaplain; 2. churchman; 3. clergyman; 4. parson; 5. pastor; 6. prie
sentence: 牧师在教堂里为大家祈祷。
pinyin: Mùshī zài jiàotáng lǐ wèi dàjiā qídǎo.
english: The pastor prayed for everyone in the church.

sentence: 我们明天一起去，好不好？
pinyin: Wǒmen míngtiān yīqǐ qù, hǎo bu hǎo?
english: Let's go together tomorrow, OK?

sentence: 她在一家外贸公司上班。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā wài mào gōng sī shàng bān.
english: She works at a foreign trade company.

sentence: 这批进口商品需要缴纳关税。
pinyin: Zhè pī jìnkǒu shāngpǐn xūyào jiǎonà guānshuì.
english: Customs duties must be paid on this batch of imported goods.

sentence: 入境时要在海关申报携带的物品。
pinyin: Rù jìng shí yào zài hǎi guān shēn bào xié dài de wù pǐn.
english: When entering the country, you need to declare the items you are carrying at customs.

sentence: 这个行业的发展前景非常好。
pinyin: Zhège hángyè de fāzhǎn qiánjǐng fēicháng hǎo.
english: The development prospects of this industry are very promising.

sentence: 今天气温很低，记得多穿衣服。
pinyin: Jīn tiān qì wēn hěn dī, jì de duō chuān yī fu.
english: The temperature is very low today — remember to dress warmly.

sentence: 他花了三年时间编写这本教材。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shí jiān biān xiě zhè běn jiào cái.
english: He spent three years compiling this textbook.

meaning: 1. model (particular version of a manufactured article); 2. type (prod
sentence: 你买的手机是什么型号的？
pinyin: Nǐ mǎi de shǒu jī shì shén me xíng hào de?
english: What model is the phone you bought?

sentence: 他在一家报纸上开了个美食专栏。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā bàozhǐ shang kāi le gè měishí zhuān lán.
english: He started a food column in a newspaper.

meaning: to come across (sb); to run into
sentence: 出门就遇上大雨，真倒霉。
pinyin: Chūmén jiù yùshàng dàyǔ, zhēn dǎoméi.
english: As soon as I stepped out I ran into heavy rain — what bad luck.
